pitch.product_pitch: Rasa plans a month of meals around your macros and your budget, then orders them for you a tap at a time.

features_benefits.benefit: Your whole month of routine meals decided once, so you stop choosing daily.
Food that fits your protein and calorie targets, estimated for you.
Eat out daily and still never blow past the number you set.
A 5-second yes before each order — smart, but never behind your back.

use_cases.context: Tap confirm on a macro-fit lunch under your cap.
Approve next week's plan in one review.

target_audiences.interests: Productivity, fitness, saving time, predictable spend
Protein targets, diet adherence, meal prep alternatives

functional.reason: Removes the daily what-to-eat decision for routine meals.
Keeps calories and macros on target without cooking or tracking.
Caps monthly food spend and optimizes with coupons.

emotional.reason: Relief from decision fatigue and diet guilt.
The calm of knowing meals and money are handled.

self_expressive.reason: I'm someone whose health and habits are quietly under control.

potential_objections.rebuttal: Rasa never orders behind your back — every order needs a one-tap confirm, and allergens are hard-blocked before anything reaches your cart.
Macros are honest estimates grounded in an India-native food database, aggregated across the day to about +/-10-15% — labeled as estimates, never medical claims.
The planner enforces variety and learns your ratings, and you can swap any meal in a tap.

brand_pitch.mission: Give people back the daily hour and headspace that food decisions quietly steal — with meals that stay balanced and within budget.
brand_pitch.ethos: Effortless, not passive. Rasa does the planning and the legwork, but you always hold the tap. Health is framed as everyday balance, never as a diet scold or a medical promise.

similarities.similarity: Filters menus by macros and allergens

differences.difference: Rasa plans a month ahead, caps budget, and is built to span platforms Swiggy never will.
Rasa actually procures the food, closing the gap between tracking a diet and eating it.

usp.unique_claim: The only planner that decides your month of meals to your macros and budget and orders them for you, one tap at a time — across every food source.
usp.supporting_proof: A multi-agent engine on the Swiggy MCP: preferences, discovery, nutrition, budget, planner, scheduler and feedback agents, gated by one-tap confirms and allergen hard-blocks.

desired_emotional_response.reason: The daily decision and the runaway bill are finally off the plate.
Nothing is ordered or spent without an explicit tap.
Someone competent is looking after how I eat.
